节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage restriction policy of the enterprise devices.
注释信息: @namespace restrictions
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@since 10

节点.功能描述: Disable or enable the printing function of the device This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @permission ohos.permission.ENTERPRISE_RESTRICT_POLICY
@param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { boolean } disabled - true if the user disables the printing function.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of setPrinterDisabled.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@syscap SystemCapability.Customization.EnterpriseDeviceManager
@systemapi
@stagemodelonly
@since 10

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
true if the user disables the printing function.
the callback of setPrinterDisabled.

节点.功能描述: Disallows the specific feature of the device. The admin must have the corresponding permission. the supported device features include modifyDateTime, bluetooth, printer, hdc, microphone, fingerprint, usb and wifi. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.

@param { string } feature - feature indicates the specific feature to be disallowed or allowed,
@param { boolean } disallow - true if disallow the specific feature of device, otherwise false.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
